notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Victor Caratini. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Ernie Clement out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw lines out to left fielder Trevor Larnach.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw flies out to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Davis Schneider to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.
